title: Fiscal Year Incorrect on Gantt Chart Feature
excerpt: The Gantt Chart Fiscal Year feature is not fully working. You can program the year to start in a particular month and the Quarters will be adjusted, but the year at the top is a year behind unless you select a January st…

posts.author: ADee (Andrea Dee)
posts.cookedHtml: The Gantt Chart Fiscal Year feature is not fully working. You can program the year to start in a particular month and the Quarters will be adjusted, but the year at the top is a year behind unless you select a January start. For example, I chose “July” as the month our fiscal year starts in the settings. When I created a task that had dates of April-Aug 2024; the task showed it started in Q4 which is correct, but 2023 was shown at the top of the chart instead of 2024.
